plugins.name: loop-spec
plugins.description: Loop-driven development from a spec file or prose prompt for Claude Code. A seven-phase cycle (SPEC/DISCUSS/PLAN/EXECUTE/VERIFY/ITERATE/DELIVER) builds and judges the feature, then reconciles one exact-SHA PR and waits for required checks before marking it ready. Includes autonomous headless, workspace, greenfield, graph-grounded design, and bounded execution modes.
